title: SPACE ACADEMY
overview: Space Academy is a live-action sci-fi children's television program produced by Filmation that originally aired Saturday mornings on the CBS television network, from September 10, 1977, to December 17, 1977. A total of fifteen half-hour episodes were made.
creator: Allen Ducovny

episodes.title: Castaways in Time and Space
